sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115342" key="yammismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψαμμ-ισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n115342.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">burying in sand,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:3:78:19" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.78.19</biblScope> </bibl>(pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
